highlights: Hardened Android launch path before the first Flutter frame
Uses a guaranteed valid Google sample AdMob app ID for the downloadable APK
Validates production AdMob app and rewarded IDs before building the Play AAB
Removed automatic Mobile Ads initialization from application startup
Loads SharedPreferences only after the first frame and recovers from stale data
Runs Flutter binding setup and runApp in the same guarded zone
Adds Android manifest and APK signing/integrity preflight checks
external_configuration_required: WARQNA_API_URL should point to the deployed HTTPS Laravel API
ADMOB_ANDROID_APP_ID must be an AdMob app ID containing ~ for production AAB ads
ADMOB_REWARDED_ANDROID_ID must be a rewarded unit ID containing / for production AAB ads
